# pto.tsethf32mode

Compatibility entrypoint. The canonical manual page is now the scalar/control reference page [pto.tsethf32mode](../../../scalar/ops/control-and-configuration/tsethf32mode.md).

## Why This Moved

`pto.tsethf32mode` keeps a historic `t`-prefixed API name, but its architectural role is scalar/control configuration state rather than tile payload transformation. New documentation should link to the scalar/control page.
